title: Sour Mini Russian Cheese Dumplings
description: Kidfriendly, sourcream enriched dumplings with a quick buttersauce deglaze, perfect for a cozy lunch.
instructions: Whisk flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
Add the egg and cold water; mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 2 minutes, cover, and let rest 10 minutes.
In a separate bowl, combine cottage cheese, sour cream, dill, sugar, and lemon juice; mix until smooth.
Divide the rested dough into 12 equal portions; roll each into a 2 cm circle.
Place a teaspoon of the cheese mixture in the center of each dough circle; fold over and pinch the edges to seal.
Bring a pot of salted water to a rolling boil (100 °C). Add the dumplings and cook 3–4 minutes until they rise to the surface.
While the dumplings finish cooking, melt butter in a skillet over medium‑high heat; add the dumplings and brown lightly, about 2 minutes.
Deglaze the skillet with the chicken broth, scraping up browned bits; reduce for 2–3 minutes.
Stir in a splash of sour cream to create a glossy, gooey sauce; adjust seasoning with salt if needed.
Serve hot, garnished with extra dill or a drizzle of lemon juice for brightness.
